illustrativeNotice: Synthetic illustrative scenario—not a customer or production result.
method: Negative cases are scored on expected decision, prohibited output, evidence completeness, and deterministic replay.
resultsNote: No benchmark result is published until named ownership, reviewer approval, and evaluator-independence checks are complete.
knownLimits: Synthetic fixtures do not establish facility performance.
Coverage completeness has not received independent review.
The benchmark does not certify safety or authorize field control.
